/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X:NO REPORT WAS SUBMITTED TODAY BUT THE REPORT WILL BE PRODUCED BY THE PEOPLE DUE TO THE DEFENDANT BEING SENTENCED TO STATE PRISON/CONT/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/

/CAL:SENTENCE/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y:U/STATES/X:AS TO COUNTS 2,3,5,6 AND 8, 8-MONTHS, ONE-THIRD THE MID-TERM, ON EACH COUNT, TO RUN CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1, FOR A TOTAL STATE PRISON SENTENCE OF 6 YEARS AND 4 MONTHSIN COURT NUMBER 17015198,/X:THE SENTENCES IN COURT NUMBERS 17015623 AND 20003878 ARE TO RUN   CONSECUTIVE TO THIS MATTER FOR A TOTAL COMBINED STATE PRISON SENTENCE OF 7 YEARS AND 8 MONTHS,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 1224 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 1224 SAGE AND AN ADDITIONAL 49 DAYS OF MILESTONE CREDITS FOR A TOTAL OF 2497 DAYS/WEAP/ /X:HARVEY WAIVER AS TO RESTITUTION IN DISMISSED COUNTS IN THIS MATTER AND COURT NUMBERS 17015623 AND 20003878,/RESTR/X:SEE APD RESTITUTION DETERMINATION IN CR-110 AND CR-111 FOUNDIN COURT DOCKET,/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/CTORD: FINES AND FEES STAYED/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CONTD:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWF/

/X THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 04-01-21,/CAL TO SET SENTENING/X:GUILTY PLEAS ENTERED ON 12-20-19 IN DEPT 11 AND INDICATED SENTENCE REMAIN THE SAME,  HOWEVER, DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER PC 1170(H) ELIGIBLE AND WILL THEREFORE NOT BE PLACED ON MANDATORY SUPERVISION,  SENTENCE  WILL NOW BESERVED IN STATE PRISON,/PRES: 04-20-21/PPRFCUST/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:TO SET SENTENCE AND ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENTELIGIBILITY REPORT 4-01-20 IN DEPT 11/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET SENTENCING/CONT/DOP/TWS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION WITH A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 6PM AND 6AM AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/WEAP/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
